rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single supporting reference in the Future Research discussion, where the authors note that conspicuous social media posting could dilute brands for some observers. It is not used to develop the main hypotheses, mechanism, study design, or core empirical claims of the citing paper. The citing paper's central contribution focuses on posters' own identity-signaling fulfillment and reduced purchase interest, so this citation functions as peripheral background rather than a direct intellectual basis.
